ogTitle: Tanilba Bay vs Tannabar: Climate Safety

heading: Tanilba Bay vs Tannabar — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tanilba Bay, New South Wales and Tannabar, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tannabar has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Tanilba Bay (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tanilba Bay or Tannabar safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tanilba Bay has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Tannabar scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tanilba Bay scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Tannabar scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tanilba Bay or Tannabar?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tannabar has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
